frontmatter.title: Content Generation Harness
frontmatter.description: A multi-agent harness I built that turns a single topic into a finished short-form educational video, and cut my video-making time by about 10x.
frontmatter.bannercaption: From a topic to a finished reel, mostly on autopilot
